title: neanotis longiflora
intro: Neanotis longiflora, a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae, is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Neanotis longiflora include its potential to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Neanotis longiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health problems.
